The '''221 sublight engine''', also called the '''Nubian 221 engine''', was an [[Engine/Legends|engine]] produced by the [[Nubia Star Drives, Incorporated/Legends|Nubian Design Collective]] for the [[N-1 starfighter/Legends|N-1 starfighter]]. The N-1 boasted twin radial 221 engines.

==Appearances==
*{{GamerCite|1|The Starfighter Trap}} {{ID|Nubian drive}}
*[[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']]
*{{Film|I}}
*[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' novelization]] {{Ab|Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st}}
*[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (junior novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' junior novelization]]
*''[[Star Wars Adventures 1: Hunt the Sun Runner]]'' {{1stID|221 sublight engine}}
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]''
